title: Public launcher DataDir: use WKAPPBOT_HOME or %USERPROFILE%/.wkappbot
desc: The public kiexpert/wkappbot launcher must use WKAPPBOT_HOME env var or %USERPROFILE%/.wkappbot as the default data root instead of AppContext.BaseDirectory. Dev builds keep <repo-root>/bin.
steps: Change DataDir to: WKAPPBOT_HOME env > %USERPROFILE%/.wkappbot > AppContext.BaseDirectory. Installer bootstraps directory on first run.
HQ path (skills/logs/runtime) and binary paths must all derive from DataDir. Never hardcode <repo-root> in production paths.
Dev override: <repo-root>/bin path remains default when WKAPPBOT_HOME is not set and AppContext.BaseDirectory matches the dev repo. Add a IsDev check via presence of csharp/ sibling.
author: claude
